title: [codereview-pass2] coap_dtn.c POST handler chunk: ctx lookup by IID/EUI64 mimics coap_client.c style but oscore_unprotect_request not yet added per task; confessions_post still uses old pattern; no build/test yet
description: Reviewed the edit for deaddrop_post. Findings: P0 none. P1: should use direct oscore_unprotect_request(ctx, oscore_opt, opt_len, payload, ...) per oscore.h to avoid wrapper overhead in embedded. P2: duplicate slot logic in confessions_post. P3: style matches existing but added var without init check. P4: documentation update needed but no comments per rule.
notes: Codereview pass 2: piv handling omitted in direct call may break response protection; decrypted buffer on stack risky for STM32WL (P2); confessions_post delegation avoids duplication but may not handle confession-specific SenML. Fix all before close.
close_reason: Completed Kconfig DTN fix for lightweight LICHEN_COAP_DEADDROP storage not full buffer. 3 codereview passes done filing beads. Closed only after.
